microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing observability workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across distributed cloud infrastructure.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive **performance CI capability** — a rack-level drill program delivered in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous regression-prevention model across desktop and cloud environments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating safe rollout across platform, product, and support stakeholders.

Built an **AI agent for drill planning** using prompt engineering and LLM-powered automation, restructuring planning workflows to cut cycle time by 39% and increase drill throughput capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Owned cross-functional performance forum and **SEV mitigation programs** spanning cloud infra and AI feature rollouts, partnering with Platform and Product Support to triage incidents, enforce observability standards, and maintain SLA compliance at scale.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across 14 Azure service teams, conducting user demos and training sessions that surfaced inference latency tradeoffs and drove measurable utilization gains saving **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ structured user interviews with Azure engineering teams, identifying critical feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized requirements for the LLM-powered tooling platform.

Improved data retrieval and **observability** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool backed by RAG architecture, cutting average lookup time by **83%** across the platform team.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, directly reducing time-to-production for capacity planning milestones.

Drove a product strategy to reduce **operational toil** during region launches — conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, quantifying 81 hours of manual effort per region, and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment and validation paths.

Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** to track toil metrics and automation coverage across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify performance regression hotspots and prioritize high-impact engineering investments across the platform.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating safe rollout sequencing across IT, Operations, and Engineering teams.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-severity tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain regression-free velocity across the embedded robotics software platform.

Partnered with Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, integrating performance and regression tests into the deployment workflow and accelerating the software release cycle by 25% across the robotics fleet.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end sales operations and managing scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow that eliminated manual handoffs and reduced cycle time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and improved conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a data-driven digital go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website funnel and Google Business profile based on performance analytics.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and building a reporting model that informed resource allocation and job-type prioritization strategy.
